clauses.clauseText: Section 11.2: Vendor liability for data breaches is limited to fees paid in the preceding 3 months.
clauses.riskExplanation: Low liability cap fails to protect against costly breach notification and recovery expenses.
clauses.recommendedFix: Renegotiate to exclude cyber breaches from liability cap. Set minimum floor of $5,000,000.

clauses.clauseText: Section 8.4: Service Provider may utilize subprocessors without prior written consent.
clauses.riskExplanation: Violates GDPR Article 28(2) and increases supply chain attack surface.
clauses.recommendedFix: Require 30-day prior notification and right to object for any new subprocessor.

clauses.clauseText: Section 4.1: Target SLA availability is set to 99.5% computed monthly.
clauses.riskExplanation: 99.5% SLA permits over 3.6 hours of outage per month for payment processing.
clauses.recommendedFix: Renegotiate uptime target to 99.99% with service credits for SLA breaches.

SOC2.name: CC6.1 - Logical Access Control
SOC2.desc: MFA, SSO, and endpoint protection must be active for all staff.

SOC2.name: CC6.3 - Perimeter Defenses
SOC2.desc: Vulnerability scanners and firewall rules must be reviewed monthly.

SOC2.name: CC7.1 - Vulnerability Management
SOC2.desc: Pen tests annually; critical findings patched within 30 days.

ISO27001.name: A.9.2 - User Access Mgmt
ISO27001.desc: Formal authorization process for privileged developer roles.

ISO27001.name: A.12.6 - Tech Vulnerabilities
ISO27001.desc: Patches cataloged and deployed systematically by severity.

ISO27001.name: A.10.1 - Cryptographic Controls
ISO27001.desc: Sensitive data encrypted at rest and in transit.

GDPR.name: Article 32 - Security of Processing
GDPR.desc: Pseudo-anonymization and log auditing on user database assets.

GDPR.name: Article 28 - Subprocessor Agreements
GDPR.desc: Contracts must declare all downstream subprocessors.

GDPR.name: Article 33 - Breach Notification
GDPR.desc: Client notification within 72 hours of security incidents.

PCI-DSS.name: Req 3 - Protect Stored Data
PCI-DSS.desc: Cardholder data must be encrypted and access restricted.

PCI-DSS.name: Req 6 - Secure Systems
PCI-DSS.desc: Develop and maintain secure systems and applications.

PCI-DSS.name: Req 11 - Test Security
PCI-DSS.desc: Regularly test security systems and processes.
